excerpt: The official programme page for Master of Nursing Science (Pre-registration) lists Priority round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-01-02. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline Priority round: 2 January 2026 Final round: 30 April 2026 *Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged. If places are no longer available after the priority round, the subsequent applications received may not be considered. *Please be reminded to upload ALL supporting documents to the Online Application System for Postgraduate Programme. Otherwise, your application may not be considered. Details are listed here .
